mapper.insert:
insert into men_task_catalog (task_catalog_id, cata_name, p_catalog_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, com_acct_id, task_id) values
(#{item.taskCatalogId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.cataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pCatalogId,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.comAcctId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
